amazon_product_details_section.Best Sellers Rank: 1,023 in Mobile Phone Portable Power Banks

features: VERSATILE CHARGING OPTIONS – This portable charger comes with two options to charge up your devices, either use the USB-C port or go wireless with MagSafe for compatible devices (iphone 12 and above) and magsafe supported cases for reliable, fast charging

FAST CHARGING ON THE GO – With a robust 5000mAh capacity, you can power up quickly during short breaks, whether you're at the airport or between meetings. Plug in a USB C cable or use the magsafe for fast charge keeping your smartphone ready to go

LED CHARGE INDICATOR – Keep informed about your battery status at a glance with the easy-to-read LED bar graph, so you always know when it’s time to recharge. Perfect for quick checks before heading out, ensuring you’re never caught with a low battery

COMPACT & SOFT-TOUCH – Fits effortlessly in your pocket or bag, making it perfect for travel and daily commutes. The soft-touch coating feels smooth and comfortable in hand, while the included charging cable for your power back ensures you’re always ready
5000MAH CAPACITY – The power bank holds approximately 1/2* full charges based on your phones battery capacity. *Calculated from Samsung S23 and Iphone 16

PEACE OF MIND – Enjoy worry-free use with a 3-year warranty, giving you long-term assurance on your investment. Just register online to activate and ensure your power bank stays protected for years to come
description: The Daewoo Portable Power Bank is your ultimate companion for keeping devices charged on the go. With its sleek, compact design, perfect for travel, commutes, and daily adventures. The soft-touch finish adds a premium feel and comfortable grip, so it’s easy to handle whether you’re charging on a busy train or relaxing at a coffee shop. Equipped with fast-charging capabilities and a USB-C port, the Daewoo power bank provides rapid power delivery to keep your devices ready when you need them most. It's also MagSafe compatible, allowing effortless wireless charging for iPhones 12 and above (without a case on) or magsafe compatible cases, just snap it on for an instant charge without any fuss. Stay in control with the LED bar graph charge indicator, which provides a quick and easy way to check your battery level at a glance. Heading out for the day or preparing for a long trip? A quick look at the LED display ensures you won’t be caught off guard with a low battery. Backed by a 3-year warranty, subject to online registration, the Daewoo Portable Power Bank is designed to offer reliable, on-the-go power you can count on.
